description: The new fiscal year (2026) is approaching. Update the CRM sequence configuration so that all newly generated Quotes, Invoices, and Purchase Orders use a '2026' prefix and start at specific designated offset numbers. Set the Quotes prefix to 'QUO-2026-' with a starting sequence of '10000', the Invoice prefix to 'INV-2026-' with a starting sequence of '5000', and the Purchase Order prefix to 'PO-2026-' with a starting sequence of '8000'. Validate the new configuration by creating a test Quote with the subject 'FY2026 Numbering Test' for an existing organization (e.g., Chemex Labs) and verifying that it automatically receives the correct sequence ID.
